programs.academic_requirements: Successful completion of an Australian bachelor degree (or equivalent) with a WAM of at least 65%. Applicants must have completed their degree within the last five years. programs.india_qualification: Indian equivalent: Successful completion of an Australian bachelor degree (or equivalent). Applicants must have at least a major study in one and preferably a minor study in a second area from the listed specialisations.. Indian students should provide transcripts from a recognised Indian university or board (CBSE/ICSE/State board) showing the equivalent standard.
